meaning: adj.(道路等)颠簸的,崎岖不平的
examples: Buckle up; it gets a bit bumpy!
A machine designed for remote areas with bumpy roads and a host of other calamities.
"It is still difficult for a biped robot to walk on a bumpy surface, even on Earth," the official said.
Right now Motorola is having a bumpy time in its consumer-paging and cellular markets in Asia.
Her hour-long commute to the small village of Perajin Mariana was down a long and bumpy road.
